metadata.command:
git add tests/unit/autonomous/SlopReducer.test.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add workspace boundary guard and unit tests for SlopReducer

Adds path traversal protection to reduceFile() and 33 unit tests covering
all fix patterns, security guards, JSONL logging, and notification batching.
Validation passed 100/100.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

metadata.command:
git add extension/src/ui/ContextContentPanel.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: show tool results alongside tool calls in conversation history

Tool Calls & Results sub-category was only displaying tool call inputs.
Now pairs tool_result blocks with their matching tool_use via tool_use_id,
showing both the call input and result preview in each card.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
